n: Chapter 1 - The Eyes and Ears of the City

steps.t: Harthabor is need of assistance to contact his leader in Umbar Baharbêl. Speak with him to learn more.
The sea-hawk sits atop a roof through the archway and east of Harthabor in Jax Phanâl. Find a method to draw the bird down, collect its message, and r…
The flat stone on the rampart to the north-east may prove a suitable place to lure the sea-hawk from its perch.
You drew the bird down from its perch and should now remove the message from its leg.
Harthabor is waiting to see the message you retrieved.
The Watcher on the Wing waits dutifully for you to give it a message to bring back to Achardis. Bring the note and tie it to her leg so she may return…
The bird is away. Harthabor awaits your return in Jax Phanâl. Go to the agent and inform him that all went well.
